Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "POTTYPAINTERINTHEJUNGLE-080E" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Potty Painter - In the Jungle.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following changes were made to allow the game to start on the title screen instead of in game: 1. Added a routine at $3000 which: a) Sets the current device number ($BA) to $01 (tape) to allow the game to run correctly b) Executes the code copied from $09E1 to $09FA c) Sets the screen colour to yellow d) Jumps to $12B5 2. Patched the JMP $09DE instruction at $0813 to be JMP $3000 instead
